name: Caramel Pecan Apple Pie
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). In a large bowl, combine apples, sugar, flour, and salt. Toss lightly. Spoon the apple mixture into the pie crust-lined pan. Dot with butter. Cover with the second crust and flute the edges. Cut slits in several places. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes or until the apples are tender. Remove the pie from the oven; immediately drizzle ice cream topping over the pie and sprinkle with pecans.
